title: In vivo Architecture of the Telomerase RNA Catalytic Core in Trypanosoma brucei
author: Abhishek Dey
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This dataset describes the RNA SHAPE (NAI) and DMS reactivities obtained for the catalytic core and Helix IV domain of Telomerase RNA from pathogen  Trypanosoma brucei  which causes African sleeping sickness. This study was conducted on both Bloodstream Form (Mammalian infective stage) and Procyclic Form (insect infective stage) of  Trypanosoma b  rucei  to determine its Telomerase RNA architecture .   The data was collected across different samples like  in vivo ,  ex vivo , Immunopurified and i n vitro  transcribed  Trypanosoma b  rucei  Telomerase RNA. RNA sequences studied along with the protocol used are also provided in the dataset.
steps_raw: This dataset describes the RNA SHAPE (NAI) and DMS reactivities obtained for the catalytic core and Helix IV domain of Telomerase RNA from pathogen  Trypanosoma brucei  which causes African sleeping sickness. keywords: RNA Chemical probing and mutational profiling
